meaning: Democratic People's Republic of Korea 朝鲜民主主义人民共和国
examples: A barter contract between China and the DPRK was officially signed the same year.
Were the differences between the DPRK and the US narrowed?
The DPRK and US also showed willingness to hold peace talks.
Resolution 1718 also requires the DPRK to abandon its ballistic missile program in a complete, verifiable and irreversible manner.
And the United States has channels of communications directly with the DPRK and those are the channels we choose to employ.
